title: Perils of the Royal Mounted
writer: Basil Dickey, Scott Littleton, Louis E. Heifetz
actors: Robert Kellard, Kenneth MacDonald, Herbert Rawlinson
plot: Mountie sergeant and his three constables find themselves facing multiple perils at the hands of an outlaw gang which, aided by a corrupt Indian medicine man and his followers, have brought a halt to construction of a key railroad...
